title: poa fallens
intro: Poa fallens, also known as False Meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa fallens include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and promote wound healing. Poa fallens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
